title: Ability to add automate Checklist addition to cards that equal a certain tag

posts.author: moonandowl (Jordan Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We use the direct card automations available in Monday.com to create cards on the 1st of the month. (Some are specifically tagged to an individual client but others are tagged #ALL.) To these #ALL cards we want to be able to automatically attached a checklist (in this case, a pre-created checklist of all our clients.)

For example: Create Monthly Reports #ALL. We don’t want to do a Create Monthly Report Client A, Create Monthly Report CLient B card.

What are you trying to achieve

For example: Create an “SEO Monthly Reports” tagged #ALL automated card on the 1st via Monday.com’s automations (this is easy). Since it is automated tagged #all, the checklist of all our clients pops onto the card automagically. We don’t want to do a Create Monthly Report Client A, Create Monthly Report Client B card because the person who does these does them in a near one fell swoop during the first few days of the month.
